title: The first exhale
hook: 30 person-nights a year where recovery becomes real.
note: Use for the opener, exhaustion, and the need for protected time.
alt: A quiet forest road framed by dense greenery and soft light.

title: Quiet erosion
hook: You can get very good at a life that is quietly hurting you.
note: Use for pause moments, emotional reframes, and the cost of waiting.
alt: A moody natural scene with muted light and a reflective atmosphere.

title: Protected time
hook: You do not need escape. You need protected time.
note: Use for the 10% reframe and the idea of repeated return.
alt: A still canopy and wilderness scene with a calm, enveloping mood.

title: Quiet proof
hook: Trust should be built on land, not language.
note: Use for proof, stewardship, and long-horizon credibility.
alt: A restored landscape image representing years of stewardship and care.

title: Belonging to a place
hook: Beforest is where recovery becomes real.
note: Use for the collectives, belonging, and what the places feel like.
alt: A lush Beforest landscape that feels lived-in, restored, and calm.

title: The shape of the membership
hook: Access changes behaviour faster than ownership.
note: Use for membership structure, person-nights, and rhythm versus accumulation.
alt: A composed Beforest visual suited to explaining the membership structure.

title: Rest is a rhythm
hook: Rest is not a reward. It is a rhythm worth protecting.
note: Use for short declarative moments and transitions into action.
alt: A refined Beforest image with warmth and editorial stillness.

title: Another year unchanged
hook: The cost of waiting is another year unchanged.
note: Use for urgency, lost margin, and the emotional cost of postponement.
alt: An introspective landscape image for the urgency section.

title: The first real step
hook: Start with the smallest real step.
note: Use for Blyton Bungalow, the pilot stay, and the final CTA.
alt: A warm Beforest hospitality image suited to the trial-stay invitation.

title: The art of return
hook: You decide with your feet, not your eyes.
note: Use for broad brand framing, the 10% Life identity, and the close.
alt: A wide Beforest hero landscape with expansive, reflective energy.
